summary: Verified new SmartProductSearch UX in /branch-transfers Request Stock tab. All critical behaviors PASS: typeahead (10 results for 'a'), data-flip='down'/'up' smart positioning (confirmed 'up' after adding 8 rows + scrolling to last input), ArrowDown keyboard nav, Enter-to-select auto-grows new empty row, qty auto-focus post-select (focused element data-testid=req-qty-<rowId>), multi-row creation via Enter (1→2→3 rows), X button clears row back to search (1→2 search inputs), fuzzy fallback chip visible for 'cosistency' (2 Consistency-* matches) and 'edgge' (8 Edge-* matches) with text 'No exact match for "<q>" — showing closest matches'. One minor Tab-order regression: Tab from qty input focuses the per-row X remove Button instead of the next empty row's product-search-input — user must press Tab twice. Spec expected direct hop to next search input.

integration_issues.flow: Request Stock — Tab from qty to next row search
integration_issues.issue: Tab from req-qty-<rowId> lands on the X remove Button (line 1711 of BranchTransferPage.js has no tabIndex) before reaching the next row's product-search-input. Spec says Tab 'should naturally move to the next row's search input'. User must press Tab twice.
affected_selectors: Button with X icon on same row

action_items: Add tabIndex={-1} to the per-row X remove button (BranchTransferPage.js line ~1711 <Button variant='ghost' ...><X size={14}/></Button>) OR move it out of the natural tab order so Tab from qty jumps straight to the next SmartProductSearch input, matching the documented UX and /sales-new parity.
critical_code_review_comments: SmartProductSearch.js is reused cleanly with `mode='request'` — good DRY. Result card in request mode is compact (name/SKU + Supply/You badges) as described.
selectReqProduct (BranchTransferPage.js:375-387) correctly mirrors UnifiedSalesPage.handleProductSelect: fills row → auto-appends empty row if last → setTimeout(60) to focus qty. Works as observed.
Row clear button (line 1711) is focusable — causes the Tab regression noted in integration_issues. Non-blocking but easy fix.

success_rate.frontend: ~95% (10/11 UX checks pass; only Tab→next-search hop deviates from spec by 1 Tab press)

seed_data_creation: None — used existing products (Consistency-*, Edge-*, etc.) in regression org.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iter 247 validated the new SmartProductSearch integration into Request Stock tab. Selectors confirmed working: data-testid='product-search-input' (only present on empty rows; filled rows render data-testid='req-product-filled-<rowId>' card with X at data-testid='req-clear-product-<rowId>'); dropdown 'search-results-dropdown' with data-flip='down'|'up' attribute flips based on viewport space; 'search-fuzzy-hint' chip appears when no strict matches but fuzzy candidates exist (both local IndexedDB fallback and backend hints supported). Tab-order issue noted — main agent needs to add tabIndex=-1 to the row's X remove button.
